"'''Two Jedi Walk Into a Bar'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Tim Bresnan]] and published in [[2005]]. It depicts an alternate version of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']], in which [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] battle [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] in the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]].

==Continuity==
The game offers rules for including neutral characters in the bar.
